problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
